title: For Love or Money? A Poker Documentary
original_title: For Love or Money? A Poker Documentary
overview: An inside look as two professional poker players, Chris Leong and Stanley Lee, attempt to win poker's most coveted prize... a World Series of Poker bracelet. Appearances include players such as Michael Rocco, Tommy Angelo, 2017 WPT World Champion Asher Conniff, and 2017 WSOP Main Event Champion Scott Blumstein.
